nl_query: For each student who filed a revaluation request that was approved, show their name, original final marks, revaluation attempt total marks, the absolute difference, and whether the difference exceeds the board's configured deviation threshold.
failed_sql:
SELECT sc.name AS student_name, rm.final_marks AS original_final_marks, ea.total_marks AS revaluation_total_marks, ABS(revaluation_total_marks - rm.final_marks) AS difference, ep.deviation_threshold, CASE WHEN ABS(revaluation_total_marks - rm.final_marks) > ep.deviation_threshold THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS exceeds_threshold
FROM   revaluation_request rr
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.id = rr.script_id
JOIN   student_cache sc ON sc.id = a.student_id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.resulting_attempt_id = rr.resulting_attempt_id
JOIN   evaluation_marks rm ON rm.attempt_id = ea.id
JOIN   board b ON b.course_id = a.course_id AND b.exam_id = a.exam_id
JOIN   evaluation_policy ep ON ep.board_id = b.id
WHERE  rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
GROUP BY sc.name, rm.final_marks, ea.total_marks, ep.deviation_threshold
ORDER BY sc.name ASC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): evaluation_attempt.final_marks, evaluation_attempt.final_marks, evaluation_attempt.final_marks, evaluation_attempt.final_marks. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
